Game.Name: Stardust Suplex (Japan)
Game.plot: Stardust Suplex is an Action game, published by Varie,which was released in Japan in 1995.Cheat: Hidden intro animationsAs the title screen flashes "PUSH START" press in the following order: A, B, X, Y, L, R, A, START. If inputted correctly, all ending sequences will now be played back to back.Cheat: Special Chibi EndingUsing any character (either in the Single or Tag Team division) complete "Stardust Super Battle" mode without losing once. Upon successfully completing "Stardust Super Battle" mode, a special "Chibi" version of your character (or, the first character chosen in the Tag Team of your choice) will now be featured in the game's closing credits.
Game.Notes: Enter the VLPW, VARIE LADYS PROFESSIONAL WRESTLING. 16 professional wrestlers are ready to fight over the VLPW title. Go one or one or tag team, either against the computer or your own friend!
